LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: DEFENDANT KIYOMI SPARKS' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: KIYOMI SPARKS' UNOPPOSED MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF TO PAY TRANSFER COSTS; NO ATTORNEY FEES AWARDED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100222982)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2023 Continued To Mar-13-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: DEFENDANT KIYOMI SPARKS' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Kiyomi Sparks' unopposed motion to transfer venue to Contra Costa County is granted; plaintiff to pay transfer costs; no attorney fees awarded.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
